backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the XpertLab backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Report, etc.) and CRUD endpoints for user profiles, tests, bookings, home collections, reports, vitals, incidents, and audit logs with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, required components, and test IDs for the XpertLab patient/staff app split and related UI features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, recent fixes, and prop changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the XpertLab SPA, setting the page title, favicon, viewport meta, and mounting the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that creates a TanStack Router with routes for AppSelectorPage (/), PatientApp (/patient-app), and StaffApp (/staff-app), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Patient-facing login screen displaying a hero banner, feature grid, and an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Alternative patient login screen with a hero image, feature cards, role-error banner, and Internet Identity authentication via the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time users to enter their name, phone, and (for staff) role, then save the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Staff portal login screen with role-based access info, a patient-account error banner, and Internet Identity sign-in using the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: Demo component that renders a simulated mobile bottom navigation bar based on a given AppRole, using roleNavConfig and a local active-index state.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Renders a table showing which modules/features (e.g., Test Booking, Audit Log) are accessible by each AppRole (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) using check/X icons.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main app shell with a sticky gradient header (logo, notification bell, user avatar) and a fixed bottom navigation bar, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Role-aware bottom navigation bar that reads the current user's role to display the appropriate nav items from roleNavConfig, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread count badge and toggles the NotificationDrawer when clicked.
Slide-in sheet drawer listing notifications with type-based icons, relative timestamps, unread highlighting, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: Layout wrapper for the patient portal with a gradient header and a five-item bottom navigation bar (Home, Book Test, Bookings, Reports, Profile).
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to '/' and users without an allowed role to their role's default path.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: Layout wrapper for staff portals that renders a role-specific bottom navigation (phlebotomist, labAdmin, or superAdmin) and a gradient header showing the role label.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: Reusable button component supporting primary gradient and outline variants, three sizes, a loading spinner state, and disabled handling.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: Full-screen centered loading indicator displaying a pulsing logo and a configurable message string.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: Simple card wrapper applying the 'card-medical' style class with optional hover/click interactivity.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: Pill badge component that maps booking/severity status strings (pending, confirmed, high, etc.) to predefined CSS class names and display labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides authentication state and actions by combining Internet Identity login/logout with the caller's backend user profile fetched via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity React context provider and hook that manages AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Polls the backend every 30 seconds to generate in-memory notifications based on the user's role (patient, phlebotomist, or admin) and exposes unread count and mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, tests, bookings, and other entities, wrapping actor calls in typed queries and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS styles, CSS custom properties for the XprtLab medical brand color system, and utility classes for gradients, cards, and animations in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page that displays all lab bookings with search and status filter controls, and allows admins to update booking statuses and navigate to the upload report page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page that lists all uploaded lab reports with search functionality, and provides view and download actions for each report's PDF file.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page that displays paginated audit logs with search and date-range filtering, rendered in a sortable table showing action type, target document, and actor.
Admin page for creating health camp entries with name, date, and location fields; on submission it stores the camp in localStorage and displays a QR code with a copyable camp ID.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Admin page that lists all incident reports filterable by severity (low/medium/high), displaying each incident with color-coded severity styling and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Admin page that allows staff to upload a PDF lab report for a patient by entering a patient principal ID, booking ID, and selecting a file, with upload progress tracking and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: Landing page that displays Patient App and Staff App portal selection cards with navigation links, branding imagery, and feature bullet points.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Demo page that visualizes the role-based access control (RBAC) system by displaying metadata, responsibilities, and navigation permissions for each app role (Patient, Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, Super Admin).
Patient-facing page for browsing and selecting diagnostic tests with search filtering, multi-select with price totaling, and navigation to slot selection.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Patient page for requesting home sample collection, supporting GPS-based address auto-fill via Nominatim, time slot selection, and test selection with total price calculation.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Patient page that fetches and displays a sorted list of the patient's test bookings, showing test names, slot time, booking ID, and status badge.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Patient page that lists all home collection requests sorted by timestamp, showing address, selected tests, time slot, and status badge.
Patient page displaying recorded health vitals (blood pressure and blood glucose); currently shows placeholder empty state since vitals are recorded by phlebotomists.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient home dashboard displaying a welcome banner, quick action cards (book test, home collection, reports, vitals), and shortcut buttons for bookings and home collections. Uses the caller's profile for personalized greeting.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: Patient/staff profile page showing account details (name, phone, principal ID) and role badge, with a sign-out button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Displays a sorted list of the patient's lab reports with view and download links, fetched via useGetMyReports hook.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows patients to select a time slot for their chosen tests and confirm a booking, showing a summary of selected tests and total price.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Phlebotomist view listing all home collection requests with address, GPS coordinates, status badge, and a dropdown to update each request's status.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: Form page for phlebotomists to record BP (systolic, diastolic, pulse) and RBS (glucose) readings for a patient identified by principal ID and booking ID, using tabbed input sections.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: A phlebotomist page that uses the camera to scan QR codes for camp check-in, displaying a live video preview with a targeting overlay, scan controls, and a list of scanned results.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Displays a combined, sorted task queue of bookings and home collection requests assigned to the phlebotomist, with inline status update dropdowns and navigation shortcuts to QR scanning and vitals recording.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: A form page for staff to submit incident reports with a description, severity level selection, and optional photo attachment, uploading the data via the submitIncident mutation.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing mini-app component that handles Internet Identity auth, role validation, profile setup, and client-side routing across all patient pages using a custom useState-based router with lazy-loaded page components.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Root component for the staff-facing app that handles authentication, role-based routing, and lazy-loads all staff pages (phlebotomist, admin, etc.) using a simple state-driven router.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Re-exports backend types and defines additional frontend-specific interfaces such as CartItem, CampEvent, CheckIn, NavItem, and RoleNavConfig.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Provides utility functions for formatting dates, times, currency (INR), principal IDs, relative timestamps, and generating unique IDs.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines per-role navigation configurations (nav items with labels, paths, and icon names) and a helper to get the default route path for each AppRole.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Provides boolean helper functions to check a user's AppRole from their profile, plus utilities to get a human-readable role label and the default navigation path.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables and brand blue/cyan), fonts, border radii, shadows, and background gradients, plus enabling dark mode and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall state of the XpertLab Flutter/Firebase project at version 11, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues (slow load due to large bundle), and a fix request to split the app into separate Patient and Staff deployments.
